code:
%% Sequence Diagram: Play Command Flow %% Purpose: Shows the complete flow when a user executes /play command %% Author: Discord Bot Team %% Last Updated: 2025-11-03 sequenceDiagram autonumber actor User as 👤 Discord User participant Discord as Discord API participant Gateway as Gateway Service participant Redis as Redis Pub/Sub participant Audio as Audio Service participant DB as PostgreSQL participant Lavalink as Lavalink participant YouTube as YouTube API Note over User,YouTube: User wants to play a song in voice channel %% Command Initiation User->>Discord: /play query: "never gonna give you up" activate Discord Discord->>Gateway: INTERACTION_CREATE event activate Gateway Note over Gateway: Validate interaction
Check permissions Gateway->>Discord: POST /interactions/{IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController}/callback
(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Discord->>User: Show processing message deactivate Discord %% Command Processing Gateway->>DB: SELECT * FROM guild_settings
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Gateway: Guild settings (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) deactivate DB Gateway->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:commands
{IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker} activate Redis Note over Redis: Message queued in pub/sub Redis->>Audio: Message delivered deactivate Redis activate Audio %% Audio Service Processing Note over Audio: Extract query and guild info Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Current queue (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) deactivate DB %% Search for Track alt Query is YouTube URL Note over Audio: Parse YouTube URL
Extract video ID else Query is search term Audio->>Lavalink: GET /loadtracks?identifier=ytsearch:{IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController} activate Lavalink Lavalink->>YouTube: Search API request activate YouTube YouTube-->>Lavalink: Search results deactivate YouTube Lavalink-->>Audio: Track results (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) deactivate Lavalink Note over Audio: Select first result end %% Cache Search Results Audio->>Redis: SETEX search:{IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode} 300 {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream} activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Add to Queue alt Queue is empty Note over Audio: This will be the first track Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) deactivate DB %% Start Playback Audio->>Lavalink: POST /sessions/{IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode}/players/{IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream}
{IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic} } activate Lavalink Note over Lavalink: Create player
Connect to voice channel Lavalink->>Discord: Voice connection (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) activate Discord Discord-->>Lavalink: Voice connection established deactivate Discord Lavalink->>YouTube: Stream audio data activate YouTube Note over Lavalink: Download and encode audio YouTube-->>Lavalink: Audio stream deactivate YouTube Lavalink->>Discord: Send opus packets (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Audio playback in voice channel deactivate Discord Lavalink-->>Audio: Player updated event deactivate Lavalink else Queue has tracks Note over Audio: Add to end of queue Audio->>DB: SELECT MAX(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: maxPosition deactivate DB Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created deactivate DB end %% Update Cache Audio->>Redis: SET queue:{IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode} {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode}
EX 3600 activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Send UI Update alt First track (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker}, ... } activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: UI update message deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: POST /channels/{IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream}/messages
{IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode], components: [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] } activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Now Playing: Song Title
[IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] deactivate Discord Gateway->>Discord: DELETE /webhooks/{IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic}/messages/@original
(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) activate Discord deactivate Discord else Added to queue Gateway->>Discord: POST /webhooks/{IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic}/messages/@original
{IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)", ephemeral: true } activate Discord Discord->>User: ✅ Added to queue (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) deactivate Discord end deactivate Gateway deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: User hears music playing in voice channel %% Track Events loop Every 5 seconds Lavalink->>Audio: PlayerUpdate event
{IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker} activate Audio Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:to-discord
{IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Player update event deactivate Redis Note over Gateway: Update UI if needed
(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) deactivate Audio end %% Track End Note over Lavalink,Audio: Track finishes playing Lavalink->>Audio: TrackEnd event
{IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic} activate Audio Audio->>DB: DELETE FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Deleted deactivate DB Audio->>DB: UPDATE queue SET position = position - 1
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue reindexed deactivate DB alt More tracks in queue Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Next track deactivate DB Note over Audio: Play next track
(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) else Queue empty and autoplay enabled Note over Audio: Generate autoplay recommendation Audio->>Audio: Get similar tracks
based on last played Note over Audio: Add to queue and play else Queue empty and autoplay disabled Audio->>Lavalink: DELETE /sessions/{IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker}/players/{IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode} activate Lavalink Lavalink-->>Audio: Player destroyed deactivate Lavalink Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Queue empty event deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: PATCH /channels/{IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic}/messages/{IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController}
{IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] } activate Discord Discord->>User: Queue finished (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) deactivate Discord end deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: Flow complete

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的播放命令流程图，从用户在Discord输入/play开始，一直到音乐真正播放出来。这个流程涉及好几个服务，包括Gateway、Audio Service、Lavalink这些。
明白，我先确认一下参与者的层级关系。用户通过Discord API触发，Gateway负责接收和验证，然后Audio Service处理实际的音频逻辑，最后Lavalink做音轨加载和编码。Redis和PostgreSQL作为中间件也要画进去对吧？
对，Redis做消息队列和缓存，PostgreSQL存队列状态和配置。还有YouTube API是外部依赖，用户搜歌的时候需要调用。
好，我先画出顶层结构，从左到右依次是User、Discord API、Gateway Service、Redis、Audio Service、DB、Lavalink、YouTube API。
第一步是用户发命令，Discord把INTERACTION_CREATE事件推给Gateway。这里Gateway要先验证权限，然后立刻回一个callback告诉Discord显示"处理中"。
画好了，从User到Discord是/play命令，Discord到Gateway是事件推送，Gateway回callback，Discord再给用户显示处理状态。
接下来Gateway要去DB查guild_settings，拿到服务器的配置，比如前缀、权限这些。然后往Redis的discord-bot:commands频道发消息，把命令广播出去。
确认一下，这里Redis是Pub/Sub模式，Gateway发布，Audio Service订阅对吧？不是简单的缓存操作。
对，是消息队列，解耦用的。Audio Service收到消息后才开始真正处理。
好的，Gateway到DB的查询，然后Gateway到Redis的PUBLISH，Redis到Audio Service的消息投递，这三步都画好了。
Audio Service拿到消息后，先查当前队列状态。然后要处理搜索逻辑——这里有个分支，如果用户给的是YouTube直链，直接解析；如果是搜索词，要走Lavalink去搜。
我画了一个alt块，第一个分支是Query is YouTube URL，直接解析；第二个分支是Query is search term，走Lavalink的/loadtracks接口，Lavalink再去调YouTube API。
搜索结果要缓存一下，用Redis的SETEX，300秒过期，key是search:加上guildId。然后进入队列处理——这里又有个分支，如果队列是空的，这首要直接播放；否则加到队尾。
直接播放的分支要画哪些步骤？Audio Service调Lavalink创建player，然后Lavalink连Discord的语音通道，再从YouTube拉流编码，最后发opus包给Discord？
没错，顺序是Audio Service POST到Lavalink的sessions接口，Lavalink建player并连语音通道，然后Lavalink从YouTube拿音频流，编码成opus，通过UDP发给Discord，用户就能听到了。
画好了，队列空的分支里有Audio到DB的INSERT，然后Audio到Lavalink的POST，Lavalink到Discord的语音连接，Lavalink到YouTube的流请求，最后Lavalink发opus包给Discord，Discord给用户播放。
队列非空的情况简单些，Audio Service查MAX(position)，然后INSERT新track。最后都要更新Redis缓存，用SET queue:guildId，1小时过期。
加上了，队列非空的alt分支，以及最后的Redis SET操作。接下来是UI更新部分？
对，UI更新也要分情况。如果是第一首歌，Audio要发PUBLISH到discord-bot:ui:now，Gateway收到后往频道发Now Playing消息，还要删掉原来的处理中消息。如果是加到队列，直接回一个ephemeral的确认就行。
画好了UI更新的alt块。现在需要画播放中的状态同步吗？比如进度更新。
要画，用loop表示每5秒一次。Lavalink给Audio Service发PlayerUpdate，Audio再PUBLISH到discord-bot:to-discord，Gateway收到后决定要不要更新UI。
loop块画好了，Every 5 seconds。最后是track结束的处理？
对，TrackEnd事件触发后，Audio Service先DELETE当前track，然后UPDATE队列把后面的往前移。之后三个分支：还有歌就继续播；没歌但开了autoplay就推荐相似歌曲；没歌且没开autoplay就销毁player，发队列结束消息。
销毁player是Audio Service调Lavalink的DELETE /sessions/{sessionId}/players/{guildId}吗？
对，就是那个接口。然后发PUBLISH通知Gateway，Gateway PATCH消息显示Queue finished。
全部画完了，包括TrackEnd后的DELETE、UPDATE，以及三个分支：继续播放、autoplay推荐、销毁player并显示队列结束。
整体流程看起来完整了。不过检查一下，Gateway在刚开始回的callback，类型应该是DEFERRED_CHANNEL_MESSAGE_WITH_SOURCE，这个细节在注释里提一下。
好的，我在Gateway到Discord的callback箭头上加了注释，标明是DEFERRED_CHANNEL_MESSAGE_WITH_SOURCE类型，这样显示处理中消息的逻辑更清晰。
还有，搜索缓存的key，我用的是search:guildId，但其实是search:query的hash吧？不然同样搜索词重复查就失去意义了。
明白了，我修正一下，Redis SETEX的key应该是search:加上query的hash或者编码后的query，而不是guildId。这样同一首歌的搜索结果可以跨服务器复用。
现在没问题了，整个流程从用户输入到音乐播放，再到队列管理和结束处理，逻辑都串起来了。可以定稿了。
